narrative:
Union Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 817 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a clear Republican lean of 6.4 percentage points.
